events.title: The Forest Claim
events.scene: The air bites with the smell of pine tar and snow-melt. A local timber agent, smelling of damp wool and ambition, offers {surname} a claim on a new logging tract deep in the wilderness. It's a gamble, requiring significant upfront capital, but the agent promises untold riches from the virgin old-growth.
events.researchNote: Scandinavian logging was a major industry in the late 19th century, often involving vast, remote tracts and considerable risk/reward.

choices.text: Invest in the logging venture, leveraging what little we have.
choices.outcome: The howl of saw blades will echo through the valley. Success is not guaranteed, but the foundation of a new kind of wealth is laid.

choices.text: Decline the offer. Better to secure our existing meager holdings.
choices.outcome: The agent leaves, frustrated. The pine forests remain untouched by {surname}'s hand, for now. Security over speculation.

events.title: The Parish Bell
events.scene: The scent of pine resin drifts in through the open door of the small, whitewashed church. The local pastor, a stern but well-meaning man, speaks of the parish's need for a new bell, hinting that a substantial donation from {full_name} would earn considerable standing and goodwill.
events.researchNote: The church played a central role in Scandinavian community life, and donations for improvements were a common way to gain social standing.

choices.text: Contribute generously to the church. Our name will be honored.
choices.outcome: The new bell tolls across the fjord, a constant reminder of {surname}'s piety and generosity, cementing their place in the community.

choices.text: Politely decline, suggesting the funds could better serve the needy.
choices.outcome: The pastor's face clouds slightly, but the community respects {given_name}'s principled stand. Still, a certain social elevation is forgone.

events.title: The Steam-Powered Saw
events.scene: The air hums with anticipation as a traveling demonstrator showcases a small, but powerful, steam engine powering a saw blade. He claims it can triple the output of any traditional water-powered mill, but the initial investment is substantial and the technology entirely new to {surname}'s region.
events.researchNote: Industrialization in Scandinavia saw the adoption of steam power in various industries, including sawmills, in the late 19th century, transforming efficiency but also requiring significant capital and risk.

choices.text: Invest in the new steam-powered sawmill. Embrace progress.
choices.outcome: The rhythmic chug of the steam engine soon dominates the soundscape, a symbol of {surname}'s ambition and willingness to adopt the future.

choices.text: Reject the newfangled machine. Our traditional methods are proven.
choices.outcome: The demonstrator packs up his marvel. {full_name} retains their capital, but the opportunity for rapid expansion passes them by.

events.title: The Land Agent's Offer
events.scene: The smell of burning peat hangs heavy in the air as a sharp-suited land agent, representing the distant noble who owns {surname}'s farm, arrives. He offers {given_name} the chance to buy the land outright, a generational opportunity to escape tenancy, but at a price that would deplete nearly all the family's savings.
events.researchNote: Land ownership was a significant issue in 19th-century Scandinavia; many farmers were tenants, and the opportunity to buy land could be transformative but also financially crippling.

choices.text: Buy the land. Secure our family's future on our own soil.
choices.outcome: The deed is signed. For the first time, {surname} owns the earth beneath their feet, a legacy for generations to come, though they are now truly impoverished.

choices.text: Decline. The price is too steep; we will use our savings for a new venture.
choices.outcome: The agent leaves, annoyed. {full_name} remains a tenant, but the saved capital is now free for investments beyond the soil, perhaps a shop in the nearby village.
